text: The muster list shows who is the designated GMDSS operator. What do the letters GMDSS stand for?

options.text: Global Marine Distress and Safety System
General Maritime Distress and Safety System
Global Maritime Distress and Safety System
Global Maritime Distress and Security System

explanation: GMDSS stands for Global Maritime Distress and Safety System. It is an internationally agreed-upon set of safety procedures, types of equipment, and communication protocols used to increase safety and make it easier to rescue distressed ships, boats, and aircraft.
